$doc: Template for ~/.claude/council/seats.json (MACHINE-LOCAL — never commit). List external reviewer seats strongest-first; the native Sonnet seat is implicit and always present. Schema v2: driver 'exec' runs argv (array — never a shell string; the orchestrator quotes each element when building the Bash command). Tokens substituted per run: {EFFORT} (from efforts.default below critical tier, efforts.max at critical), {PROMPT_TEXT} (the review prompt content; for stdin-transport seats omit the token and set transport 'stdin' — the prompt file is piped). timeoutSeconds bounds each seat run. Only add a seat AFTER its driver smoke test passes (see drivers/). Empty seats [] = native-only council.

$schema_fields.name: short id, used in ledger + output filenames
$schema_fields.lineage: openai | google | zhipu | anthropic | other — used for diversity reporting
$schema_fields.driver: exec (external CLI) — native-agent is implicit, never listed
$schema_fields.transport: stdin (pipe prompt file) | arg (substitute {PROMPT_TEXT} in argv)
$schema_fields.efforts: {default, max} — values are CLI-specific (see driver doc)
